title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 10 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 10 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 10 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 10/06/2025
Today, Dalian iron ore futures jumped initially and then pulled back, operating in the doldrums throughout the day. The most-traded contract I2509 eventuallyclosed at 698.5, with a daily decline of 0.85%. Traders' enthusiasm for selling was moderate, and steel mills mainly purchased as needed.
